creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Log:
  graphics/py-opengl{-accelerate}: 3.0.1 -> 3.1.0, change to PyPI naming

  - upgrade fixes the use of the port
  - py-opengl -> py-PyOpenGL
  - py-opengl-accelerate -> py-PyOpenGL-accelerate
